Breakdown.Goal: Полное подключение обработки медиа (voice/photo/document/audio/video_note) end-to-end: от TG handler до Claude и обратно, со стейджингом/промоушеном, тестами и документацией.

RunState.note: EPIC COMPLETE — all 5 chunks closed (aisw-zny, aisw-m2m, aisw-ahv, aisw-8r9, aisw-nzl), epic aisw-hcl closed. Branch feat/media-handling-full not pushed to git remote (per policy).

Chunk.Title: wire VoiceHandler+PhotoIngestor into DefaultPipeline
Chunk.Inputs: src/ai_steward_wiki/__main__.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/settings.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/pipeline.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/voice.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/photo.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/wiki/lifecycle.py, pyproject.toml, uv.lock, docs/Spec-WIKI/decisions/D-022-voice-photo-input.md
Chunk.Outputs: src/ai_steward_wiki/__main__.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/settings.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/pipeline.py, pyproject.toml, uv.lock, tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline_voice.py, tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline_photo.py, docs/superpowers/specs/20260512-media-handling-full/discovery-chunk1.md, docs/superpowers/specs/20260512-media-handling-full/design-chunk1.md, docs/superpowers/plans/20260512-media-handling-full/step-01-plan.md, .env.example, (maybe) docs/adr/ADR-NNN-faster-whisper-packaging.md
Chunk.Verification: uv run python -m ai_steward_wiki then send voice -> reply is transcript/Stage-1 result or ACK_VOICE_UNAVAILABLE_RU; logs show runtime.media_pipeline.wired voice=true photo=true and NO tg.pipeline.voice.no_handler. make total-test exit 0.

Chunk.Title: accept media paths so photos reach Claude vision
Chunk.Inputs: src/ai_steward_wiki/wiki/runner.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/claude_cli/common.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/pipeline.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/photo.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/__main__.py, claude --help, Context7 claude-code CLI docs
Chunk.Outputs: src/ai_steward_wiki/wiki/runner.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/pipeline.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/photo.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/__main__.py, tests/unit/wiki/test_runner.py, tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline_photo.py, tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline_document.py, docs/superpowers/specs/.../discovery-chunk2.md, design-chunk2.md, step-02-plan.md
Chunk.Verification: send photo -> meaningful text reply; logs tg.pipeline.photo -> tg.pipeline.runner.dispatched -> ...deliver.sent. unit: argv contains media flag; runner.run called with media_paths. make total-test exit 0.
Chunk.SplitNote: If post-Discovery estimate >60% window: split into 2.a (runner media_paths+argv+unit) and 2.b (pipeline on_photo/image-doc wiring+integration).

Chunk.Title: audio / video_note content types and message captions
Chunk.Outputs: src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/handlers.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/pipeline.py, tests/unit/tg/test_handlers.py, tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline_*.py, docs/superpowers/specs/.../discovery-chunk3.md, design-chunk3.md, step-03-plan.md
Chunk.Verification: send audio file -> transcribed as voice; photo with caption -> caption reaches Stage-1; video_note -> handled or reject-string. make total-test exit 0.

Chunk.Title: promote staged media to target WIKI on success + scheduled 24h staging sweep
Chunk.Outputs: src/ai_steward_wiki/scheduler/maintenance.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/wiki/runner.py (maybe), src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/pipeline.py, tests/unit/inbox/test_staging.py, tests/unit/scheduler/test_maintenance.py, docs/superpowers/specs/.../discovery-chunk4.md, design-chunk4.md, step-04-plan.md
Chunk.Verification: after processing voice/photo: file in <target-wiki>/raw/media/<ISO8601>_<sha8>.ext, _staging empty; stale staging file (>24h) removed by background job. make total-test exit 0.

Chunk.Title: media handling e2e + docs refresh + completion report
Chunk.Verification: make total-test exit 0; RUN_INTEGRATION=1 uv run pytest tests/integration green; grace lint --failOn errors exit 0; report exists.

Decisions.Decision: faster-whisper moved to core deps (not extra). Voice is primary MVP feature (D-022). + defensive ImportError→VoiceUnavailableError→ACK_VOICE_UNAVAILABLE_RU. Auto-applied (one-sided dominance: correctness/just-works vs image-size; image size not a correctness concern, no voice-less deploy profile).
media_staging_root = single dir (default /var/lib/ai-steward-wiki/workspace/media-staging), not per-user. Per-user Inbox-WIKI absent from lifecycle.py; promotion to target wiki deferred to chunk 4.
voice_whisper_model_size default 'small' (D-022 bench RTF≤0.5 on small).

Image → Claude via --add-dir <staged-file dir> + path in user_input (Read tool). claude CLI 2.1.139 has no --image; --file is for remote file_id. Only viable mechanism, not a choice → auto-apply, no ADR.
on_photo gets its own L2 dedup on image bytes (kind='file'), then _run_text_pipeline(skip_l2_dedup=True) — the synthetic photo prompt is constant, text-level dedup would false-positive.
Per-call vision timeout 30s (D-022) NOT implemented — adapter uses one _RunConfig.timeout_s (wiki_runner_timeout_s, 300s). Deferred; needs an optional timeout override in WikiRunner.run.

F.audio and F.video_note both route to on_voice (STT path) — faster-whisper/pyav demuxes mp3/ogg/m4a and the audio track of mp4 video notes; staged ext cosmetic. More useful than a reject; covers D-022 trigger list. No ffmpeg precondition (pyav bundles libav).
message.caption forwarded only for photo in chunk 3 (D-022 caption requirement is photo-focused). Document captions + voice/audio captions deferred.

Staging→raw promotion is adapter-side (_WikiRunnerAdapter.run after a successful run_wiki_session) — the adapter knows wiki_path (= wiki_root/<owner_telegram_id> in current MVP). New promote_path_to_raw(staging_path, wiki_root, now) re-hashes and delegates to promote_to_raw. Pipeline untouched. Failed runs leave the file in _staging for the 24h sweep job (D-022 No-WIKI flow).
register_all_retention_jobs is still not called from __main__.py (chunk 12-14 maintenance jobs unwired) — out of scope for chunk 4; media sweep wired directly. Worth a separate task.

ReassessLog.Reassess: No structural drift for chunks 2-5. Note: chunk 4 (promote_to_raw) needs MediaRef threaded from on_voice/on_photo to the point where target WIKI is known — to be designed in chunk 4 Discovery. media_staging_root now exists as Settings field (chunk 4 sweep job will read it). No tail regeneration needed.

No structural drift for chunks 3-5. chunk 4: MediaRef threading — now both on_voice and on_photo create a MediaRef before _run_text_pipeline; chunk 4 should add an optional media_ref param to _run_text_pipeline and promote it after a successful run when target wiki is known (wiki_root/<owner_telegram_id> in current MVP). chunk 3 (caption) will add caption param to on_photo/on_document/on_voice — chunk 2 already routes photo via _run_text_pipeline, so chunk 3 just substitutes caption for PHOTO_PROMPT_RU when present. No tail regeneration.

TotalTestLog.Run: ruff-check 0; ruff-format 0 reformat; mypy 66 files 0 errors; grace-lint governed=66 xml=3 errors=0 warnings=0; inv-lint 14/14; test-cov 419 passed coverage=90.65%. ALL PASSED.

ruff-check 0; ruff-format 0 reformat; mypy 66 files 0 errors; grace-lint governed=66 xml=3 errors=0 warnings=0; inv-lint 14/14; test-cov 428 passed coverage=90.74%. ALL PASSED.
ruff-check 0; ruff-format 0 reformat; mypy 66 files 0 errors; grace-lint governed=66 xml=3 errors=0 warnings=0; inv-lint 14/14; test-cov 432 passed coverage=90.54%. ALL PASSED.

ruff-check 0; ruff-format 0 reformat; mypy 66 files 0 errors; grace-lint governed=66 xml=3 errors=0 warnings=0; inv-lint 14/14; test-cov 432 passed coverage=90.54%. ALL PASSED. (integration suite +2 photo scenarios, gated, skipped under CLAUDECODE=1.)
